name: IdsEdwMrLnSvcCatGrpReplFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH RealData AS (SELECT MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_RPLC_SK AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_ID, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.EFF_DT_SK, COALESCE(CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.TERM_DT_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.ACTURL_HLTH_CST_GRP_CAT_ID, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.CST_MDL_UNIT_OF_MESR_ID, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_DESC, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_PFX_DESC, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_BODY_DESC, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_SFX_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT.VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_RPLC AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD_MPPNG ON MR_LN_SVC_CAT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD_MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MR_LN_SVC_CAT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND MR_LN_SVC_CAT.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_RPLC_SK NOT IN (0,1)), NA_Row AS (SELECT 1 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 'NA' AS MR_LN_ID, '1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK, 'NA' AS ACTURL_HLTH_CST_GRP_CAT_ID, 'NA' AS CST_MDL_UNIT_OF_MESR_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_DESC, 'NA' AS MR_LN_PFX_DESC, 'NA' AS MR_LN_BODY_DESC, 'NA' AS MR_LN_SFX_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID), UNK_Row AS (SELECT 0 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_ID, '1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS ACTURL_HLTH_CST_GRP_CAT_ID, 'UNK' AS CST_MDL_UNIT_OF_MESR_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_DESC, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_PFX_DESC, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_BODY_DESC, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_SFX_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID) SELECT * FROM RealData UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NA_Row UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK_Row
